---
title: "Arthur Duke Coleridge"
---

## Arthur Duke Coleridge

**Dates:** (1830/1-1913)

### Description

father of Mary Elizabeth Coleridge

### Biography

Third son of Francis Coleridge, solicitor, of Ottery (brother to Sir John Taylor Coleridge) he was the elder brother of Alice Mary Coleridge, and a cousin of Coleridge Patteson and Mary Coleridge.  His mother Frances Duke (Taylor) Coleridge was a first cousin of CMY’s grandfather the Rev. Duke Yonge, so they were third cousins. [Obituaries <i>Times</i>  30, 31 October 1913]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 27th 1897

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
